name: CMI Limited
summary: CMI Limited engages in the business of manufacture of wires and cables worldwide. The company offers various type of cables, such as quad, railway signalling, fire survival, fire retardant low smoke zero halogen, flexible multi-core copper shielded abrasion resistant thermoplastic polyurethanes sheathed, polythene insulated jelly filled telecom, fire alarm, communication, ethylene propylene rubber, composite, trailing, welding, submersible, chloro-sulfonated polyethylene, polychloroprene, silicon, instrumentation and control, solar, aerial bunch, low voltage, high voltage, extra high voltage, and low, high, and extra high voltage power cables. It also provides flexible and building wires; and bare conductors. CMI Limited serves various industries, including railways, oil and gas, space research, nuclear and solar power, defense, cement, mining, infrastructure, steel, telecommunications, mobility, energy, industrial, power, petrochemicals, etc. The company was formerly known as Choudhari Metal Industries Pvt Ltd. CMI Limited was founded in 1967 and is based in New Delhi, India.
